column6: "Seniority Level" field disappears from view when Work Mode dropdown is opened

column6: Step 3 'Details — Type & location' is missing the Location field
column7: Step 3 of the Create Job wizard is labelled 'Details — Type & location' but only contains two fields: Engagement Length and Number of Openings. There is no Location field present, despite the step label explicitly mentioning 'location'.

column10: Only Engagement Length and Number of Openings fields are present; no Location field

column6: "Engagement Length" dropdown offers only two vague options (Short Term / Long Term)
column7: The Engagement Length dropdown in Step 3 only provides 'Short Term' and 'Long Term' as options, with no further definition or duration range. This is ambiguous for recruiters who need to specify contract durations.

column9: More granular options such as '3 months', '6 months', '1 year', 'Permanent/Ongoing'
column10: Only 'Short Term' and 'Long Term' offered

column6: Location fields placed in Step 4 'Compensation' instead of Step 3 'Details — Type & location'
column7: Step 4 is labelled 'Compensation — Salary & benefits' but its section heading reads 'Location & Compensation' and includes Country and Timezone fields. These location fields logically belong in Step 3 which is labelled 'Details — Type & location'.
column8: Create Job → proceed to Step 4
column9: Step 4 should only contain salary/compensation fields; location fields should be in Step 3
column10: Step 4 contains Country, Timezone, Minimum Salary, Maximum Salary, and Currency

column6: Job creation success modal overlaps the form content instead of replacing it

column9: Success message replaces the form, or user is redirected to the job detail page
column10: Success banner overlays the form; form fields remain visible behind the modal
